## Description

<!-- Clearly describe what this PR changes and why. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] chore: tooling, deps, CI
- [ ] style: formatting, styling
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] test: adding or fixing tests

## Screenshots

<!-- For UI changes, add screenshots or recordings. Delete if not applicable. -->

## Manual testing

<!-- List the steps you performed to verify this change. -->

- [ ] Frontend builds without errors (`cd frontend && npm run build`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`cd frontend && npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tested on Chrome
- [ ] Tested on Firefox

## Checklist

<!-- Confirm每一项 -->

- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`type/description`)
- [ ] My commits follow the [commit guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-guidelines)
- [ ] I updated documentation (README.md / DOCUMENTATION.md) if needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests if needed
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new lint errors
- [ ] I have no secrets, API keys, or `.env` files committed
